name: Cline
description: Open-source autonomous coding agent for VS Code and multi-IDE that creates/edits files, runs terminal commands, uses browser with computer use, and supports MCP. 100% BYOK.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Depends on user's API key limits. No built-in limits in the extension.
free_tier_limits.notes: 100% BYOK. Free and open source (Apache 2.0). No paid tiers — you pay only for API usage via your own keys. Can also use local models for $0.

notes: Originally 'Claude Dev', renamed to Cline. 4.27M VS Code installs. 63k GitHub stars. Apache 2.0. Now multi-IDE: VS Code, JetBrains, Cursor, Windsurf, Zed, Neovim. Also has CLI (`npm i -g cline`), SDK, Kanban multi-agent board. Features: Plan/Act toggle, MCP Marketplace, Computer Use, checkpoints, headless CI/CD, multi-agent teams, Slack/Telegram integrations.

name: Roo Code
description: Open-source VS Code extension (forked from Cline) with specialized agent modes (Code, Architect, Ask, Debug), multi-model BYOK, and MCP integration. Shut down May 2026.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Depends on user's API key. No built-in limits.
free_tier_limits.notes: 100% BYOK. Free and open source (Apache 2.0). Forked from Cline. Now shut down.

notes: 1.72M VS Code installs. 24.2k GitHub stars. Forked from Cline (late 2024), later forked by Kilo Code. Shut down May 15, 2026 as team went all-in on Roomote (operational engineering agent). Standout feature: Custom Modes (Code, Architect, Ask, Debug).

name: Void
description: Open-source AI IDE (VS Code fork) with agent mode, autocomplete, and inline editing. BYOK-only, privacy-first Cursor alternative. Deprecated June 2026.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Your API key's limits apply. No limits from Void itself. No account required.
free_tier_limits.notes: 100% BYOK. No free LLM credits from Void. Must bring your own API key or use local models via Ollama.

notes: Note: Void was an AI IDE (VS Code fork), NOT a VS Code extension. GitHub archived/read-only June 2, 2026. 28.8k stars at deprecation. Created by Glass Devtools Inc (YC S2024). Successor projects listed in void-forks repo.

name: CodeGPT
description: AI coding assistant connecting to 20+ AI providers via BYOK, with agent mode, chat, autocomplete (paid add-on), and local model support.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_day: N/A (30 total one-time trial, not daily)
free_tier_limits.autocomplete_suggestions: Not included in free tier ($8/mo add-on)
free_tier_limits.chat_messages: 30 without API key (one-time), unlimited with BYOK
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: BYOK: depends on provider. 30 trial: no explicit rate limit beyond total cap.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free plan is BYOK-based. 30 free interactions via CodeGPT credits without API key. After trial, must BYOK or buy credits.

notes: 2.4M+ VS Code installs. Supports 20+ providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, Groq, DeepSeek, Azure, Bedrock, Nvidia, Cohere, Fireworks, Perplexity, Cerebras, Grok) and local (Ollama, LM Studio). Autocomplete is a paid add-on $8/mo. Extension ID: DanielSanMedium.dscodegpt.

name: Aider
description: Open source AI pair programming CLI tool that connects to LLMs to edit code directly in git repos with automatic commits. Created by Paul Gauthier.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Depends on user's API key or free tier provider limits. No built-in limits.
free_tier_limits.notes: 100% BYOK. Free and open source (Apache 2.0). No paid tiers. Can be $0 using local models (Ollama) or free API tiers (Gemini Exp, OpenRouter free, Groq free).

notes: 46k+ GitHub stars. 6.8M+ PyPI installs. Python-based (pip/pipx/homebrew). Deepest git integration — every change auto-committed with descriptive messages. Repo-map for codebase context. 100+ language support via tree-sitter. Features: voice-to-code, image/web page context, lint/test auto-fix loop, architect/ask/code modes. Aider Polyglot leaderboard is de facto coding model benchmark.

name: Goose
description: Open-source extensible AI agent originally by Block (Square), now under Linux Foundation's AAIF. Desktop app, CLI, and API with native MCP and 15+ LLM providers.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: None (depends on chosen provider). No Goose-imposed limits.
free_tier_limits.notes: Goose itself is free and open source. Only pay for LLM API usage. Use local models via Ollama for completely free and offline.

notes: Originally by Block (Square), open-sourced Jan 2025 (Apache 2.0). Donated to Linux Foundation's AAIF Dec 2025. Repo: aaif-goose/goose. 48.7k+ GitHub stars, 500+ contributors, 137 releases (v1.37.0). Rust + TypeScript UI. Desktop (macOS/Linux/Windows), CLI, API. 70+ MCP extensions, 15+ LLM providers. Features: subagents, recipes (YAML workflows), MCP Apps, prompt injection detection, sandbox mode.
